Class EventHandler<RequestData, EventT extends SfsEventModel, HandledT>

java.lang.Object
com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.handling.EventHandler<RequestData, EventT, HandledT>
Direct Known Subclasses:
CorrelatedEventHandler, UncorrelatedEventHandler
